name: McCarthy Law PLC
description_short: McCarthy Law PLC is a credit repair provider based in Scottsdale, Arizona. Rated 4.4/5 with 77 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
McCarthy Law PLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Scottsdale, Arizona. Carrying a 4.4/5.0 Google rating from 77 reviews, McCarthy Law PLC has an strong reputation among consumers in the Scottsdale area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit counseling service, bankruptcy attorney, bankruptcy service, McCarthy Law PLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Scottsdale, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. McCarthy Law PLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Scottsdale, Arizona area who are considering McCarthy Law PLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
